info.description: This API allows a front-end application to interact with the calendars of sales representatives
info.title: Agenda API

get.description: Retrieve an appointment by its ID

By passing in the search criteria, you can search for
corresponding appointments in the system

403.description: user does not have the permissions to perform this operation

post.description: Adds an appointment to the system

schema.description: the ID of the newly created appointment

403.description: user does not have the permissions to perform this operation

delete.description: Deletes an appointment from the system

403.description: user does not have the permissions to perform this operation

patch.summary: updates all the fields of an appointment
patch.description: Updates an appointment into the system

403.description: user does not have the permissions to perform this operation

put.summary: updates the status of an appointment
put.description: Updates an appointment's status into the system

403.description: user does not have the permissions to perform this operation

get.description: Retrieve a recusrion by its ID

schema.description: the ID of the newly created recursion

403.description: user does not have the permissions to perform this operation

patch.summary: updates all the fields of a recursion
patch.description: Updates a recursion into the system

403.description: user does not have the permissions to perform this operation

get.description: Retrieve metada such as option set values and system URL

By passing in the search criteria, you can search for
corresponding contacts in the system

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: pass the search string for looking for contacts

403.description: user does not have the permissions to perform this operation

get.description:
By passing in the search criteria, you can search for
corresponding cities in the system. The search contains maximum of 10 results based

parameters.name: searchString
parameters.description: pass the search string for looking for cities (city name or post code)

403.description: user does not have the permissions to perform this operation

get.description:
By passing in the search criteria, you can search for
corresponding sellers in the system

parameters.name: searchString
parameters.description: pass the search string for looking for sellers

allday.description: does the appointment last all day

is_commercial_type.description: is it a commercial or personal appointment

is_blocked_conf.description: is the appointment confirmation in progress

is_reopen_possible.description: true if the appointment can be reopened

Appointment.description: appointment between a seller and a client

interval.description: set to 1 to repeat each day or week

Cdv.description: sales cycle (CDV) is an ongoing sales opportunity

Contact.description: a contact is a client handled by a seller

is_editable_calendar.description: true if seller's appointments can be modified

url_template_contact.description: base string for buidling direct URL to access a CRM contact

url_template_cdv.description: base string for buidling direct URL to access a CRM sales cycle

default_duration.description: default duration in minutes for an appointment

optionsets.description: list of option sets in the system

sellers.description: all the sellers whose calendar can be accessed by the current user

agencies.description: all the agencies that can be accessed by the current user

closing_appointment_matrix.description: table of possible options for closing appointments

error_comment.example: SQL Error key is not unique
